ast.name: addOption
ast.source: Next to note in the folder specified below
ast.target: 在下方指定文件夹中，与笔记同级

ast.name: addOption
ast.source: In the root folder specified below
ast.target: 在下方指定的根文件夹中

ast.name: error
ast.source: Triyng to enqueue item with attempts < 1
ast.target: 尝试将尝试次数小于 1 的项目加入队列

ast.name: log
ast.target: 排除文件夹正则表达式：

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show notifications when pages were processed.

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Do not show additional commands in command palette. Reload the plugin in settings to take effect (turn off/on).
ast.target: 不在命令面板中显示额外命令。在设置中重新加载插件以生效（关闭/开启）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 在创建/复制/粘贴时处理笔记。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Interval in seconds for processing update. It takes some time to reveal changed content of a note to plugins.
ast.target: 处理更新的间隔秒数。需要一些时间才能向插件显示笔记的更改内容。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If an error occurs during downloading (network etc.) try to re-download several times.
ast.target: 如果下载过程中发生错误（网络等），尝试重新下载多次。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Process all new created/cloud-synced files with corresponding extensions.
ast.target: 处理所有新创建/云同步的具有相应扩展名的文件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The plugin will also move all attachments from obsidian default folder to plugin folder.
ast.target: 插件还会将所有附件从 Obsidian 默认文件夹移动到插件文件夹。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The plugin will use MD5 when renaming all new attachments.
ast.target: 插件将在重命名所有新附件时使用 MD5。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Download unknown filetypes and save them with .unknown extension.
ast.target: 下载未知文件类型并以 .unknown 扩展名保存。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Compress all downloaded images. May reduce file size by several times, but can also affect performance.
ast.target: 压缩所有下载的图片。可能会将文件大小减少数倍，但也可能影响性能。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Compress all pasted images. May reduce file size by several times, but can also affect performance.
ast.target: 压缩所有粘贴的图片。可能会将文件大小减少数倍，但也可能影响性能。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Select image compression type. Keep in mind that webp format has image size limitations.
ast.target: 选择图片压缩类型。请注意，webp 格式有图片尺寸限制。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Excluded folders. New files in these folders will not be processed automatically.
ast.target: 排除的文件夹。这些文件夹中的新文件将不会自动处理。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Do not download files with size less than this value. Set 0 for no limit.
ast.target: 不下载小于此值的文件。设置为 0 表示无限制。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The plugin will not download attachments with these extensions.
ast.target: 插件将不会下载带有这些扩展名的附件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The plugin will not create an Obsidian attachments folder. This may cause the plugin to behave incorrectly.
ast.target: 插件将不会创建 Obsidian 附件文件夹。这可能会导致插件行为异常。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Add media links captions to converted tags.
ast.target: 为转换后的标签添加媒体链接标题。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Add [[original filename]] or [original filename](link to attachment) after replaced tag (only for file:// protocol or dropped/pasted files ).
ast.target: 在替换后的标签后添加 [[原始文件名]] 或 [原始文件名](附件链接)（仅适用于 file:// 协议或拖放/粘贴的文件）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Include only files with extensions only matching this pattern. Example: md|canvas
ast.target: 仅包含扩展名匹配此模式的文件。示例：md|canvas

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Do not move orphaned files into the garbage can.
ast.target: 不要将孤立文件移入回收站。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Select whether to write full paths in tags or not.
ast.target: 选择是否在标签中写入完整路径。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Date format for ${date} variable. E.g.                  | MMMM Do YYYY, h:mm:ss a (March 20th 2024, 10:54:46 am)                  | dddd  (Wednesday)                 | MMM Do YY  (Mar 20th 24)
ast.target: ${date} 变量的日期格式。例如：| MMMM Do YYYY, h:mm:ss a（2024年3月20日 上午10:54:46）| dddd（星期三）| MMM Do YY（24年3月20日）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source:
Select where all new attachments will be saved.
You can use templates e.g. _resouces/${date}/${notename}
ast.target:
选择所有新附件的保存位置。
您可以使用模板，例如 _resouces/${date}/${notename}

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Rename or move this folder to the obsidian or system garbage can when the associated note is deleted/renamed/moved.                   This setting takes effect only if the path contains ${notename} template at the end                  and the options 'Next to note in the folder specified below' / 'Relative to note' are selected.                  Use this setting at your own risk.
ast.target: 当关联的笔记被删除/重命名/移动时，将此文件夹重命名或移动到 Obsidian 或系统回收站。此设置仅在路径末尾包含 ${notename} 模板，且选择了

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Folder to keep all downloaded media files.
ast.target: 用于保存所有下载媒体文件的文件夹。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Number of retries for every single attachment

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 处理所有新的 Markdown 文件

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Use MD5 for new attachments (Pasted images and files)
ast.target: 对新附件使用 MD5（粘贴的图片和文件）

ast.name: setName
ast.source: File size lower limit in Kb

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Do not create Obsidian attachment folder (For compatibility with other plugins)
ast.target: 不创建 Obsidian 附件文件夹（用于兼容其他插件）

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Add original filename or 'Open file' tag
ast.target: 添加原始文件名或'打开文件'标签

ast.name: setName
ast.source: How to write paths in tags

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 移动/删除/重命名媒体文件夹

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.source: Enter the full path in new lines, e.g. RootFolder/Subfolder.
ast.target: 在新行中输入完整路径，例如 RootFolder/Subfolder。

ast.name: name
ast.source: Localize attachments for the current note (plugin folder)
ast.target: 为当前笔记本地化附件（插件文件夹）

ast.name: name
ast.source: Localize attachments for the current note (Obsidian folder)
ast.target: 为当前笔记本地化附件（Obsidian 文件夹）

ast.name: name
ast.source: Set the first found # header as a note name.
ast.target: 将首个找到的 # 标题设为笔记名称

ast.name: name
ast.source: Localize attachments for all your notes (plugin folder)
ast.target: 为所有笔记本地化附件（插件文件夹）

ast.name: name
ast.source: Convert selection from html to markdown
ast.target: 将选区从 HTML 转换为 Markdown

ast.name: name
ast.target: 删除所有孤立附件（Obsidian 文件夹）

ast.name: name
ast.target: 删除所有孤立附件（插件文件夹）
